ValidationRule.description: Force users to close opps via the buttons. ** Changed the logic to "Toggle". Meaning when Closing the Opp from the Flow it will change the SYS Close Flow CB**
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED( StageName ) && NOT(ISCHANGED(SYS_CloseFlow__c)) && (ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Closed Won") || ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Closed Lost")) && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps" && $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator" && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please use Opportunity Won/Opportunity Lost buttons.
